scripts.dev:dashboard:win: npm run build --workspace packages/types && npm run dev --workspace apps/dashboard
scripts.dev:public:win: npm run build --workspace packages/types && npm run dev --workspace apps/public-site
scripts.dev:win: npm run build --workspace packages/types && concurrently -n dashboard,public-site -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace apps/dashboard" "npm run dev --workspace apps/public-site"
scripts.build:functions: npm run build --workspace packages/types && npm run build --workspace firebase/functions
